category_sources: Official Read the Docs page describes twarc as collecting and archiving Twitter JSON data via the Twitter API.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool and Python library for archiving Twitter JSON.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository title use twarc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to twarc-project.readthedocs.io as documentation.
Read the Docs site contains twarc install, command, plugin, tutorial, and library API pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Twitter API collection, archiving, plugins, and library use.
source_facts.description identifies CLI, Python library, Twitter JSON archiving.
